title: Creating a Persona for a Food Truck Owner
scenario: Design a persona for a food truck owner who is passionate about serving unique and delicious food to customers. The owner's name is Sofia, and they are 29 years old. The persona should include demographics, goals, challenges, and pain points. Ensure the persona is 100-250 words, written in the first person, and is focused on the owner's food truck business. Use a casual tone and a conversational style.
constraints: Must be written in the first person

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the persona description accurately reflect the provided context?
Is the tone of the persona description casual and conversational?
Is the persona description within the specified word count range?
